createdBy.description: User who created the device posture check

createdDate.description: Time the device posture check was created

description.description: Description of the device posture check

id.description: The ID of the device posture check

lastUpdate.description: Time the device posture check was updated

lastUpdatedBy.description: User who updated the device posture check

mappingType.description: Represents how the device posture check is rendered in device assurance policies

name.description: Display name of the device posture check

query.description: OSQuery for the device posture check

remediationSettings.description: Represents the remediation instructions shown to the end user when the device posture check fails

defaultUrl.description: Default URL for the link. This property is only relevant if type is set to `BUILTIN`. If type is set to `CUSTOM`, this field is ignored.

defaultI18nKey.description: Default i18n key for the message. This property is only relevant if type is set to `BUILTIN`. If type is set to `CUSTOM`, this field is ignored.

variableName.description: Unique name of the device posture check

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
